appraisal_events.evidence: « la demoiselle de Robert de Saint-Loup … elle est à mourir de rire … Robert de Saint-Loup a peut-être l'ivresse, mais il n'a vraiment pas fait preuve de goût dans le choix du flacon ! »
appraisal_events.explanation: By ridiculing Robert’s companion and then stating he has shown no taste in choosing her, the duchesse discredits Robert via his association and explicitly faults his discernment.

status_effects.explanation: His taste and judgment are disparaged through mocking his companion, lowering his immediate standing.
